title: Companion — Declared & Constituted (paired specimens)
medium: five ComfyUI photograph pairs (RealVisXL V5.0). each pair shows one job, two enforcement modes: cone vs. Jersey barrier; placard vs. vitrine; speed-limit sign vs. speed bump; dress-code placard vs. 180-lux warm downlight; menu photograph vs. plastic food sample.
caption: Every object carries a rule. Some carry it on the surface, some in the shape. A city's ratio between the two is a measurement of how much it still trusts its inhabitants.
